header.name: Julien Connault
header.title: Software Engineer (Front-End Focused)
header.description: Full-Stack Engineer with a strong front-end focus, experienced in building end-to-end systems in early-stage startups. I work across UI, API design, authentication, and data modeling, with a focus on maintainable architecture and developer experience.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
experience.description: Architecting and scaling a high-trust ecosystem of applications, including Certless (secure logistics) and Metastate (digital identity/governance), utilizing SvelteKit, NestJS, and Monorepo architectures.
highlights: Architected and maintained a robust monorepo (NestJS, SvelteKit, Docker) implementing advanced authentication with Better Auth, Zod-driven validation, and shared type-safe contracts.
Led the development of a KYC-first onboarding flow and Trust Score Service for the Metastate eID Wallet, incorporating complex identity verification and audit event logging.
Engineered interactive data visualizations using force-directed graphs to map signed e-references and social graphs within the governance control panel.
Standardized frontend excellence by implementing Formsnap/Superforms for accessible UX and MSW-based mock APIs to decouple development and accelerate iteration cycles.
Collaborated on cross-platform mobile stability, resolving critical iOS/Android rendering bugs and implementing platform-specific deep linking for digital asset stores.
Mentored team members through comprehensive PR reviews (including 9000+ LoC refactors) and provided architectural technical overviews to facilitate rapid onboarding.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
experience.description: Worked on Orobo, a platform for Digital Product Passports (DPPs) and verifiable credentials.
highlights: Developed full-stack features using Svelte, NestJS, and SQL-based databases
Built reusable, accessible UI components and contributed to backend APIs and data modeling
Progressively took ownership of backend responsibilities within the NestJS codebase

experience.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
experience.description: Designing, building, and maintaining the website of a non-profit supporting trafficked children in Madagascar.
highlights: Full ownership from design to production, including a recent complete redesign to improve UX and accessibility
Implemented a blog system with admin authentication and features supporting donor engagement

experience.title: Early-Stage Startup & Client Projects
experience.description: Contributed to multiple early-stage startups and client projects, often with full-stack ownership, while completing a Bachelor's degree.
highlights: Worked in small teams or solo on MVPs and V0 platforms under tight constraints
Developed strong autonomy, adaptability, and pragmatic problem-solving skills

projects.title: Elevatus Foundation
projects.desc: Website for the Elevatus Foundation, a non-profit organization that provides education for trafficked children in Madagascar.

projects.title: Sandbox
projects.desc: A collection of small projects and experiments. This website is always evolving and might be prone to bugs.

projects.title: Orobo
projects.desc: Public repository of published Digital Product Passports (DPPs)

academics.degreeTitle: Bachelor of Science in Applied Technology
academics.coursework: Additional coursework in Web Development, Computer Programming, and Business Analysis
